allow: Bash(node -e "const rn = require\('./node_modules/react-native/package.json'\); console.log\('react-native peerDependencies:', JSON.stringify\(rn.peerDependencies\)\); console.log\('react-native version:', rn.version\);")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./node_modules/@storybook/react-vite/package.json'\); console.log\('deps:', JSON.stringify\(Object.keys\(p.dependencies || {}\).filter\(k => k.includes\('vite'\) || k.includes\('react'\)\), null, 2\)\); console.log\('peers:', JSON.stringify\(Object.keys\(p.peerDependencies || {}\), null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./node_modules/@storybook/builder-vite/package.json'\); console.log\('deps \(vite related\):', JSON.stringify\(Object.keys\(p.dependencies || {}\).filter\(k => k.includes\('vite'\) || k.includes\('react'\) || k.includes\('@vitejs'\)\), null, 2\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./node_modules/@storybook/react/package.json'\); console.log\('ALL deps:', JSON.stringify\(p.dependencies, null, 2\)\);")
